title: Daily Memo: US Offers Plan for Peace in Iran
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Initial proposal. Washington is pushing for a “framework agreement” with Tehran to bring an end to the war in Iran, Israel’s Channel 12 reported, citing sources familiar with the matter. Under the plan, both countries would begin discussions on a 15-point proposal to end the fighting completely, following a month-long ceasefire. This proposal would require […]

The post Daily Memo: US Offers Plan for Peace in Iran appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
Initial proposal. Washington is pushing for a “framework agreement” with Tehran to bring an end to the war in Iran, Israel’s Channel 12 reported, citing sources familiar with the matter. Under the plan, both countries would begin discussions on a 15-point proposal to end the fighting completely, following a month-long ceasefire. This proposal would require […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years. GPF is non-ideological, analyzes the world and forecasts the future using geopolitics: political, economic, military and geographic dimensions at the foundation of a nation.
